rulings.Case Title: WARREN SAUNDERS VS. MICHAEL KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 22, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of each cause of action as described in the opposition pertain to each Fence A and/or Fence B. (See Opposition 2:24-27). No references to Fence A or Fence B can be found in the First Amended Complaint. The Court also notes that the allegations as to the pendency of appeal are made "as of the filing of this Complaint" (e.g. See FAC 4:24-25) not as of the filing of the operative First Amended Complaint.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WARREN SAUNDERS VS. MICHAEL KRAMER ET AL

rulings.Case Title: PAUL P. KELLY ET AL VS. WILLIAM M. JORGENSEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 22, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT WILLIAM JORGENSEN's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement DENIED. Defendant received payments due under the Stipulation as Defendant provided timely notice and "vacated" within the meaning of the agreement by April 30, 2017. The Court notes that the final $500 payment was made late.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 22, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC's Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One OFF CALENDAR, inadequate proof of service. i.e. the declarant "caused" hand-delivery; no declaration by the person accomplishing the delivery.= (501/REQ)
